action_set_definitions.name: get_environmental_report
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current global state of the environment, including available budget, total timber inventory, and ecological health score.

action_set_definitions.name: get_plot_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves biological and operational data for a specific forest plot.

plot_id.description: The unique identifier of the plot (e.g., 'B-22', 'C-08').

action_set_definitions.name: list_equipment_specs
action_set_definitions.description: Returns a list of available harvesting and extraction equipment with their operational types and environmental impact ratings.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_harvest_operation
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a timber harvest and extraction operation on a specific plot. Updates timber inventory and health score based on duration and equipment used.

plot_id.description: ID of the plot to harvest.

equipment_id.description: ID of the equipment to use.

duration_hours.description: Number of hours the operation will run.

action_set_definitions.name: liquidate_timber_stock
action_set_definitions.description: Sells a specified quantity of harvested timber from the inventory to increase the available budget.

volume_to_sell.description: The amount of timber to sell from inventory.

state_description.current_year: The current year of the simulation cycle.
state_description.available_budget: Total funds available for operations, equipment, and labor.
state_description.forest_plots: A list of forest segments with their specific biological data.
state_description.total_timber_inventory: Amount of harvested timber currently in storage and ready for sale.
state_description.ecological_health_score: A metric (0-100) representing biodiversity and soil stability.
